---
title: "extra"
author: "Shilpa Gupta"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
Welcome to my [digital garden](https://www.technologyreview.com/2020/09/03/1007716/digital-gardens-let-you-cultivate-your-own-little-bit-of-the-internet/), where i explore my adventures in data science pedagogy.
